observable_failures: FaceDetector fails to detect faces smaller than 40x40 pixels (min_face_size=40 hardcoded in MTCNN constructor at face_detector.py:89)
Faces detected with confidence below 0.9 are ignored even when valid (hardcoded at face_detector.py:126)
Low-resolution images result in frequent missed detections (MTCNN min_face_size=40 is frozen at construction, face_detector.py:80-95)
No adaptation mechanism exists for varying image quality (_adjust_detection_parameters exists at face_detector.py:33-55 but is DEAD CODE — never called)
repair_targets: FaceDetector.detect_faces must call _adjust_detection_parameters() before MTCNN invocation and use the returned dynamic (adjusted_min_face_size, adjusted_confidence_threshold) instead of hardcoded values
Implement dynamic adjustment of min_face_size based on image characteristics
Implement dynamic adjustment of confidence thresholds based on image characteristics
Ensure faces in low-resolution or small-face images are reliably detected
Backend/config.py MTCNN_CONFIG['min_face_size':40] should be wired to FaceDetector instead of being dead config
regression_expectations: Existing detection behavior on standard/high-quality images must not degrade
Default detection parameters (min_face_size=40, confidence=0.9) must remain when sensitivity is not configured
Face detection on high-resolution images must continue to work correctly

semantic_boundaries: FaceDetector class is located at repo/backend/models/face_detector.py:8
MTCNN model is used internally for face detection
min_face_size is currently fixed at 40 pixels at face_detector.py:89; confidence threshold is currently fixed at 0.9 at face_detector.py:126
set_detection_sensitivity() must accept min_face_size_factor: float = 1.0 and confidence_threshold_offset: float = 0.0
_adjust_detection_parameters() must accept a PIL.Image.Image and return (min_face_size: int, confidence_threshold: float)
behavioral_constraints: EXISTS (DEAD): _adjust_detection_parameters(image_width, image_height) defined at face_detector.py:33-55 — computes adjusted min_face_size and confidence_threshold using stored sensitivity factors, includes low-res override, clamps values. MUST BE CALLED from detect_faces before line 126.

EXISTS (DEAD): set_detection_sensitivity(min_face_size_factor, confidence_threshold_offset) defined at face_detector.py:19-31 — validates and stores to instance variables. MUST BE CALLED by API or wired to take effect.
When set_detection_sensitivity is called with min_face_size_factor=0.5, effective min_face_size should halve (e.g., 40 -> 20) via _adjust_detection_parameters
When set_detection_sensitivity is called with confidence_threshold_offset=-0.1, effective confidence threshold should lower by 0.1 (e.g., 0.9 -> 0.8) via _adjust_detection_parameters
Detection parameters must update immediately upon set_detection_sensitivity() being called — currently no caller exists
Pre-processing steps (super-resolution or adaptive upsampling) may be used as an alternative implementation strategy
backward_compatibility: Default parameter values (min_face_size=40, confidence_threshold=0.9) must be preserved when set_detection_sensitivity is not called
Existing face detection on standard or high-quality images must not be negatively impacted
similar_implementation_patterns: backend/models/face_detector.py:33-55 — _adjust_detection_parameters() is the primary adaptive param adjustment pattern: takes image_width/height, applies _min_face_size_factor multiplier and _confidence_threshold_offset to base values 40/0.9, includes low-res override (reduces by 20% for dims < 200px), clamps min_face_size to >=20 and threshold to [0.5, 0.99]. This method EXISTS but is DEAD CODE — never called from anywhere.

backend/models/face_detector.py:19-31 — set_detection_sensitivity() is the sensitivity setter pattern: validates min_face_size_factor in [0.1, 2.0] and confidence_threshold_offset in [-0.5, 0.5], stores to instance variables. This method EXISTS but is NEVER CALLED.

backend/utils/image_processor.py:96-97, 107-121 — PIL.Image width/height reading and resize patterns: image.width/height attributes, image.resize(size, Image.BILINEAR), isinstance(image, np.ndarray) then Image.fromarray() pattern.
backend/nmodels/utils/detect_face.py:339-343 — get_size() helper handles np/tensor/PIL uniformly: numpy/torch uses img.shape[1::-1], PIL uses img.size.
backend/nmodels/utils/detect_face.py:308-329 — imresample() and crop_resize() with cv2/PIL/torch branches for upsampling/interpolation in MTCNN scale pyramid.

backend/config.py:23, 38-40 — Static threshold constants: similarity threshold 0.6, min_face_size 40, MTCNN 3-stage thresholds [0.6, 0.7, 0.7], factor 0.709. These are defined but never consumed by FaceDetector (dead config).
backend/nmodels/utils/detect_face.py:79, 126, 157 — Three-stage threshold application: per-network threshold array [0.6, 0.7, 0.7] applied sequentially in PNet, RNet, ONet.
backend/models/face_detector.py:126-127 — Post-detection filtering pattern: hardcoded prob > 0.9 filter applied after MTCNN returns results.
missing_elements_to_implement: detect_faces() (face_detector.py:103-139) must call _adjust_detection_parameters() before line 126 using image dimensions (w, h = image.size available at line 134) and use the returned adjusted_confidence_threshold instead of hardcoded prob > 0.9

MTCNN min_face_size (currently frozen at face_detector.py:89) must become dynamic — either MTCNN must support per-call min_face_size override, or _load_detector() must be restructured to support lazy re-instantiation with per-call adjusted parameters
backend/config.py:38 MTCNN_CONFIG['min_face_size':40] must be wired into FaceDetector._load_detector() or detect_faces() — currently dead config entry never consumed
backend/config.py:39 MTCNN_CONFIG['thresholds':[0.6,0.7,0.7]] must be wired into FaceDetector._load_detector() — currently hardcoded duplicate at face_detector.py:90

suspect_entities: backend/models/face_detector.py:11-17 — __init__ initializes _min_face_size_factor=1.0 and _confidence_threshold_offset=0.0 but these are never used in detection
backend/models/face_detector.py:80-95 — _load_detector() hardcodes min_face_size=40 into MTCNN constructor (line 89) — ignores stored sensitivity factor
